subject: [RFC PATCH v2 2/7] mm, swap: support zswap and zeroswap as vswap backends

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch adds support for zswap and zeroswap as virtual swap backends, allowing pages to be compressed or detected as zero-filled without pre-allocating physical swap slots. It builds on the existing swap-table infrastructure and introduces virtual swap entries that decouple PTE swap entries from physical backing. The patch only supports zswap and zero-page backends for now, with physical disk backing fallback and writeback of vswap-backed entries to be implemented in subsequent patches.
